name: Dellan Moor
excerpt: Dellan Moor is a 29-year-old former soldier living in hiding.
notes: Dellan Moor, aged 29, was a soldier in the 14th Lowland infantry regiment. He deserted fourteen months ago during a reassignment to a punitive posting in the eastern districts. Currently, he lives with Sable Voss in a disused highwayman's waystation on the moorland north of the main coastal road. They have been there for eight months, growing food and making occasional trips to rural markets. Dellan is skilled in practical tasks like carpentry and basic medicine. He and Sable made the decision to desert together, and he trusts her completely. He is less frightened now but aware of the need for a long-term solution.
